name: Marinated Beef
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Green bell pepper, cut into 4 pieces
1/2 Red bell pepper, cut into 4 pieces
1/2 Yellow bell pepper, cut into 4 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the lemon juice, grated onion, vinegar, oil, ground cumin, garlic powder, and crushed red pepper.
2. Add the beef cubes and bell peppers to the mixture, stirring until all ingredients are well coated.
3. Thread the beef cubes and pepper pieces onto 4 skewers, adding one onion to each.
4. Place the kabobs on a rack in the broiler, positioning them so that the surface of the meat is 3 to 4 inches from the heat.
5. Broil for 12 to 15 minutes, turning occasionally, until the beef reaches the desired doneness.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Makes 4 servings.
